calls.notes: ASP.NET Identity sign-in. lockoutOnFailure: true means repeated failures increment the lockout counter. Returns SignInResult with Succeeded, IsLockedOut, IsNotAllowed, RequiresTwoFactor booleans. Does NOT issue a cookie (isPersistent: false, and PublicApi uses JWT not cookie auth).
Only called when result.Succeeded is true.
Loads the ApplicationUser row to obtain the user's ID for role lookup.
Retrieves all role names assigned to this user. Each becomes a ClaimTypes.Role claim in the JWT.
